name: Frontend: Blog Redesign, Fix 500 errors, Rich Product Editor
description: 1. Resolve 'cyclic object value' on Users page by mapping data with toRaw(). 2. Redesign Blog list and article pages: fix 1970 dates (Intl.DateTimeFormat), fix tag display (use tag.name), add consistent padding and CSS variables from tokens.css. 3. Integrate TipTap (BlogEditor) into Product create/edit forms for 'content_json' field. 4. Create a rich display layout for products that renders TipTap content.
